headline: One baby log for the whole care team.
subhead: Parents, partners, grandparents, and nannies see the same history.
focus: the first-launch screen that explains BabyRelay as a shared care log
motif: crescent baby illustration, passing-hands care symbols, warm nursery paper textures
prompt:
Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: 6.9-inch iPhone App Store screenshot, vertical portrait poster
Primary request: Create a premium, pure gpt-image-2 App Store screenshot for BabyRelay that tells a clear product story.
Inputs: Image 1 is the real BabyRelay app screenshot to place inside the phone. Image 2 is the preferred visual style reference; use it only for mood, depth, typography feel, and nursery editorial craft.
Preservation: Preserve Image 1 as the product truth inside the phone frame. Keep the app UI recognizable, readable, and honest. Do not invent app screens or product features.
Story role: this frame should explain one specific BabyRelay benefit and fit a sequence: shared log → quick daily logging → next-up guidance → multiple children → handoff → care team.
Canvas: tall portrait App Store screenshot, elegant cream paper/nursery editorial composition with high contrast, warm clay accents, sage leaves, cocoa black text, moonlight gold, and soft realistic shadows.
Text (verbatim): headline "One baby log for the whole care team." and subhead "Parents, partners, grandparents, and nannies see the same history.".
Composition: large readable benefit-led headline at top, concise subhead below, iPhone frame centered/lower as product hero. Use tasteful baby-care props around the phone; avoid generic gradients or flat empty templates.
Focus: the first-launch screen that explains BabyRelay as a shared care log.
Motifs: crescent baby illustration, passing-hands care symbols, warm nursery paper textures.
Constraints: no paywall screenshot, no fake awards, no App Store badges, no star ratings, no medical claims, no sleep-training promises, no watermarks, no extra headline text, no QR-code focus. Do not make it childish or cluttered. Keep product UI legible and the story clear.

subhead: Sleep, feeds, diapers, and notes take seconds.
